statement.latex: Is a (conjugacy,$p 0.2ex$-conju\-ga\-cy) biprimitively finite group finite if it has a finite maximal subgroup ($p 0.2ex$-sub\-group)? There are affirmative answers for conjugacy biprimitively finite$p 0.2ex$-groups and for 2-conjugacy biprimitively finite groups (V.\,P.\,Shunkov, Algebra and Logic, 9, no.\,4 (1970), 291--297; 11, no.\,4 (1972), 260--272; 12, no.\,5 (1973), 347--353), while the st...
